input.background: Of 75 patients in a follow-up study, 20 showed spontaneous improvement within a month.
input.question: Include a 95% confidence interval for the proportion.

output.answer:
Confidence interval for \( p \) by the plus-four method:

\[
\begin{aligned}
& \bar{n}=79 \\
& \bar{x}=22 \\
& \bar{p}=0.2785 \\
& S E_{\bar{p}}=\sqrt{\frac{(0.2785)(0.7215)}{79}}=0.0504
\end{aligned}
\]

\( 95 \% \) confidence interval for \( p=0.2785 \pm(1.96)(0.0504)=0.2785 \pm 0.0988= \) 0.1797 to 0.3773 or about \( 18 \% \) to \( 38 \% \).
